login.title: Welcome back
login.description: Sign in to continue to your dashboard.

errors.missingCredentials: Please enter your email and password.
errors.userNotFound: No account was found for this email address.
errors.invalidPassword: The password you entered is incorrect.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please verify your email before signing in.
errors.default: Unable to sign in right now. Please try again.

form.title: Create your account
form.description: Fill in your details to get started.

confirm.title: Check your inbox
confirm.description: We sent a confirmation email to {email}. Please open it and confirm your account.

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.description: Enter the activation code from your email to verify your account.
verify.missingEmail: We are missing your email address. Please use the verification link from your email.
verify.codeRequired: Please enter the activation code from your email.
verify.error: We could not verify your email.
verify.success: Your email has been verified successfully.
verify.redirecting: Your account is verified. Click "Back to login" to continue.

reset.title: Reset your password
reset.description: Set a new password for your account.
reset.error: We could not process your request.
reset.success: If an account exists for this email, a reset link has been sent.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

support.title: Contact support
support.description: Send us a message and we will get back to you soon.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.attachmentHelp: Allowed file types: JPG, JPEG, PNG, GIF. Maximum size: 3 MB.
support.fileTypeError: Invalid file type. Please upload JPG, JPEG, PNG, or GIF.
support.fileSizeError: File is too large. Maximum allowed size is 3 MB.
support.success: Your message has been sent successfully.

user-avatar.title: Profile photo
user-avatar.success: Your profile photo has been updated.

errors.passwordLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

user-update.title: Profile information
user-update.successMessage: Your profile has been updated successfully.

user-delete.title: Delete account
user-delete.description: Permanently remove your account and all related data.

add.title: Add team member

delete.title: Delete user
delete.label: Type DELETE to confirm deletion of

demote.desc: This user will lose administrator permissions.
demote.label: Type DEMOTE to confirm changes for

promote.title: Grant admin rights

promote.label: Type PROMOTE to confirm changes for

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your account and team preferences.
